name: Kafr el-Sheikh Governorate (Egypt)
description: A light-blue field charged at the centre with the Kafr el-Sheikh Governorate emblem.
history: The flag of Kafr el-Sheikh Governorate displays its emblem on a yellow field reflecting the wheat and rice of the Nile Delta, adopted as part of the system of governorate flags introduced in the 2000s.

features.symbolism: the multi-coloured emblem of Kafr el-Sheikh, evoking the Mediterranean coast, Lake Burullus, agricultural fields and the Arabic name of the governorate
